description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by lush palm trees and featuring a spacious driveway leading to a two-car garage. The structure is predominantly white and gray, with large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto a patio and a swimming pool area. The landscaping includes manicured lawns, a circular outdoor seating area, and a mix of paved and green spaces. The building has clean, geometric lines and an open layout, with multiple outdoor living spaces integrated into the design. The rear of the bungalow features a large pool bordered by a privacy fence and additional greenery. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing indoor-outdoor living and privacy.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, a pool, garage, and lush palm landscaping, designed for open indoor-outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and circular outdoor seating area with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and the depth of the property with visible palm trees and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, privacy fence, and extensive glass windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, secondary entrance, and more of the landscaped garden and outdoor seating.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
